fields.label: System Name
fields.description: Display name for the source system (e.g., SAP ERP, Shopify, Manual Entry)

fields.label: System Code
fields.description: Unique identifier (slug). Example: sap-erp, shopify, manual-entry

fields.label: System Type
fields.options:
ERP
PIM
E-Commerce
DAM
Supplier Portal
Manual Entry
API
File Import
Other
fields.description: Category of the source system

fields.label: Enabled
fields.description: Enable or disable this source system for data imports

fields.label: Priority
fields.description: Priority for survivorship rules. Lower number = higher priority (1 is highest)

fields.label: Confidence Level
fields.description: Default confidence level for data from this source (0-100%)

fields.label: Is Authoritative Source
fields.description: If checked, this source is considered the authoritative source of truth for certain fields

fields.label: Authoritative Fields
fields.description: Comma-separated list of field names this source is authoritative for

fields.label: Connection Type
fields.options:
None
REST API
SOAP
Database
File (SFTP)
File (Local)
Webhook
fields.description: How data is received from this source

fields.label: Base URL
fields.description: API endpoint base URL

fields.label: Authentication Type
fields.options:
None
API Key
OAuth 2.0
Basic Auth
Bearer Token
fields.description: Authentication method for API connections

fields.label: API Key Header Name
fields.description: Header name for API key (e.g., X-API-Key, Authorization)

fields.label: API Key / Token
fields.description: API key or token (stored encrypted)

fields.label: Default Import Configuration
fields.description: Default configuration for importing data from this source

fields.label: External Identifier Field
fields.description: Field name in source system used as unique identifier (e.g., product_id, sku, item_code)

fields.label: Timestamp Field
fields.description: Field name for last modified timestamp in source data

fields.label: Timestamp Format
fields.description: Format string for parsing timestamps (e.g., %Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)

fields.label: Description
fields.description: Detailed description of the source system and its data characteristics

fields.label: Contact Name
fields.description: Name of person responsible for this data source

fields.label: Contact Email
fields.description: Email for data quality issues or sync problems

fields.label: Department
fields.description: Department owning this data source

fields.label: Last Sync At
fields.description: Timestamp of last successful data sync

fields.label: Records Imported
fields.description: Total number of records imported from this source

fields.label: Last Error
fields.description: Last error message if sync failed

fields.label: Average Confidence
fields.description: Average confidence level of data from this source based on quality checks
